headline: MRNA Stock Gains After CHMP Endorses COVID-19-Influenza Combo Shot
summary: Moderna jumps 4% after EU panel backs mCombriax, its COVID-19-flu combo shot, with phase III data showing stronger immune response vs standalone vaccines.

raw.headline: MRNA Stock Gains After CHMP Endorses COVID-19-Influenza Combo Shot
